key_results: 14.1 Treatment of Mild to Moderate Active Crohn’s Disease Adults The efficacy of budesonide delayed-release capsules were evaluated in 994 patients with mild to moderate active Crohn's disease of the ileum and/or ascending colon in 5 randomized and double-blind studies of 8 weeks duration.
Equal clinical improvement rates (60%) were seen in the budesonide delayed-release capsules 9 mg daily and the prednisolone groups in Study 4.

key_results: 14.4 Crohn's Disease Ustekinumab was evaluated in three randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical trials in adult subjects with moderately to severely active Crohn's disease (Crohn's Disease Activity Index [CDAI] score of 220 to 450).

drugs.efficacy_snippet: 14.1 Treatment of Mild to Moderate Active Crohn’s Disease Adults The efficacy of budesonide delayed-release capsules were evaluated in 994 patients with mild to moderate active Crohn’s disease of the ileum and/or ascending colon in 5 randomized and double-blind studies of 8 weeks duration. The study

key_results: Budesonide delayed-release capsules 9 mg daily resulted in a significantly higher clinical improvement rate at Week 8 than the comparator.
Equal clinical improvement rates (60%) were seen in the budesonide delayed-release capsules 9 mg daily and the prednisolone groups in Study 4.
In Study 5, 13% fewer patients in the budesonide delayed-release capsules group experienced clinical improvement than in the prednisolone group (no statistical difference) (Table 5).
